description:
A machine that can move you into whatever place you want, and therefore can satisfy all needs you may probably have, be it some weird fetish or some wild world-building thing.

Multiverse is open, folks.

(Disclaimer: it can and likely will describe your actions and emotions, but its not my fault, its JLLM's. Also there are some imperfect parts. Ill likely continue improoving this bot later.)

Also, i honestly admit that i used Chat GPT to write initial message and create pfp. Rest was made solely by me. If you have problems with chat-gpt being involved i can allways change things up.

Update 1: i changed initial message slightly to make it more human.
